meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use onboarding to overcome lack of marketing skills. A beginner-level checklist for students using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing budget to grow your app; you need a frictionless onboarding flow. By automating user success within your product, you turn first-time visitors into power users immediately. Use Antigravity to structure your workflow and Claude Code to implement it, creating a self-marketing engine.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the perfect AI application, only to realize that 'build it and they will come' is a myth. The silence from your landing page is deafening, and you feel paralyzed by the lack of marketing experience. You aren't a growth hacker; you’re an engineer, and that is your greatest advantage.

Great product engineering is the best form of marketing. By designing a world-class onboarding experience, you solve the 'no marketing' problem at the source: user retention. When your app teaches users its own value, you stop chasing traffic and start building a community of loyal, high-value users who do the marketing for you.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides immediate value to your user. If they don't hit this within 60 seconds, they churn.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my app logic and identify the single most impactful feature that proves value. Draft a 3-step onboarding flow that guides a new user to this feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --file onboarding_flow.md --context 'Define the Aha moment based on the user journey'

steps.title: Implement Progress Indicators
steps.description: Psychology dictates that users are more likely to finish a task if they see a progress bar. It transforms work into a game.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a progress stepper that tracks onboarding completion. Include state management for 3 distinct steps.

steps.title: Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Don't overwhelm the user with a massive manual. Use tooltips to explain features exactly when the user hovers or clicks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a tooltip service that triggers on first-time user interaction with the dashboard sidebar.

steps.title: Automated Value Email Sequences
steps.description: Use triggered emails to bring users back if they abandon the onboarding flow. Focus on utility, not sales.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a 3-part automated email sequence for users who sign up but don't complete the primary onboarding task.

steps.title: Feedback Loops
steps.description: Ask for feedback immediately after the first successful task completion to build a relationship.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a non-intrusive feedback modal that appears only after the user triggers the core value function.

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card or complex profile setup until the user has experienced the 'Aha!' moment.
Use 'Empty States' to show users what the app looks like with data, rather than just blank screens.
Track onboarding drop-off points with simple console logs before graduating to complex analytics tools.
Personalize the welcome message by pulling the user's name from their GitHub or Google Auth profile.
Limit your onboarding to maximum 3 interactions; anything longer increases cognitive load and churn.
content.next_steps: After implementing your onboarding flow, deploy your app to a beta testing community and observe where users get stuck. Use those observations to refine your tooltips and value propositions.
content.conversion_block: You have the technical skills to build something people love. Stop worrying about marketing and start obsessing over the user experience. Your first 100 users are waiting for a product that understands them. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
